title: Anthropic cuts off Fable 5 and Mythos 5 access following government order
summary: On Friday evening, the government ordered Anthropic to block access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all foreign nations, both inside and outside the US, due to national security concerns. That order included employees of Anthropic. To meet those demands, the company has completely cut off access to the models for all customers. In […]
title_es: Anthropic bloquea globalmente Fable 5 y Mythos 5 por orden gubernamental
bajada: El gobierno ordenó a Anthropic desactivar acceso a dos modelos por preocupaciones de seguridad nacional, afectando a clientes internacionales e incluso empleados. La medida representa una intervención sin precedentes en la distribución de modelos de IA.
bajada_en: The government ordered Anthropic to disable access to two models due to national security concerns, affecting international clients and even employees. The measure represents an unprecedented intervention in AI model distribution.

title: Amazon security research reportedly led to the White House’s Anthropic Fable ban
summary: According to the Wall Street Journal, the export control directive that led to Anthropic cutting off access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 was triggered in part by cybersecurity research from Amazon and conversations between CEO Andy Jassy and the White House. According to the report, the paper from Amazon claims that, through a series […]
title_es: Investigación de Amazon en la Casa Blanca llevó a bloqueo de modelos Anthropic
bajada: Según reportes, Amazon presentó un paper de ciberseguridad a la Casa Blanca que motivó una orden de control de exportaciones contra Anthropic. El CEO Andy Jassy tuvo conversaciones previas que precedieron la restricción de Fable 5 y Mythos 5.
bajada_en: Reports suggest Amazon presented a cybersecurity paper to the White House that prompted an export control order against Anthropic. CEO Andy Jassy had prior conversations that preceded the restriction of Fable 5 and Mythos 5.

title: A Court Has Ruled That Google Is Liable for False Statements Generated by AI Overviews
summary: The ruling holds that a company that designs, trains, operates, and manages an AI system must assume legal liability for any damages caused by the responses it generates.
title_es: Google declarado responsable por información falsa en AI Overviews
bajada: Un tribunal dictaminó que Google es legalmente responsable por daños causados por respuestas falsas de su sistema de IA. La sentencia establece que las empresas que diseñan y operan sistemas de IA deben asumir responsabilidad legal por sus salidas.
bajada_en: A court ruled that Google is legally liable for damages caused by false statements from its AI system. The ruling establishes that companies designing and operating AI systems must assume legal responsibility for their outputs.

title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
summary: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.
title_es: Anthropic suspende acceso a modelos: India cuestiona su futuro en IA
bajada: Tras la suspensión de Anthropic, líderes tecnológicos indios debaten si es una alerta sobre las ambiciones del país en IA. El incidente expone vulnerabilidades en el acceso a tecnología de frontera y dependencias geopolíticas.
bajada_en: Following Anthropic's suspension, Indian tech leaders debate whether it's a wake-up call for the country's AI ambitions. The incident exposes vulnerabilities in accessing cutting-edge technology and geopolitical dependencies.

title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
summary: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.
title_es: CEO de Amazon alertó al gobierno sobre modelos de Anthropic
bajada: Andy Jassy posiblemente fue la fuente de preocupaciones de seguridad que llevaron a Anthropic a restringir acceso mundial a dos modelos. El incidente sugiere influencia corporativa en decisiones regulatorias de IA.
bajada_en: Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to restrict worldwide access to two models. The incident suggests corporate influence in AI regulatory decisions.

title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
summary: Meta starts dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversed.
title_es: Meta deshace adquisición de Manus de $2B tras presión de China
bajada: Meta inicia el desmantelamiento de su adquisición de Manus tras una orden de Beijing. El movimiento refleja presiones geopolíticas sobre inversiones tecnológicas occidentales en el sector de IA.
bajada_en: Meta begins dismantling its Manus acquisition after Beijing's order. The move reflects geopolitical pressure on Western tech investments in the AI sector.

title: Police officer investigated for using AI to 'create evidence' in multiple cases
title_es: Policía investigado por fabricar evidencia con IA en múltiples casos
bajada: Un oficial de la policía de Derbyshire fue investigado por usar IA para crear evidencia ficticia en investigaciones. El incidente destaca riesgos de mal uso de sistemas de IA en contextos legales y de justicia penal.
bajada_en: A Derbyshire police officer is being investigated for using AI to create false evidence in multiple cases. The incident highlights risks of AI misuse in legal and criminal justice contexts.

title: NVIDIA /SkillSpector
summary: SkillSpector Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks before installing agent skills. Overview AI agent skills (used by Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, etc.) execute with implicit trust and minimal vetting. Research shows that 26.1% of skills contain vulnerabilities and 5.2% show likely malicious intent . SkillSpector helps you answer: "Is this skill safe to install?" Documentation Development guide — Architecture, package layout, and how to extend the analyzer pipeline. Features Multi-format input : Scan Git repos, URLs, zip files, directories, or single files 64 vulnerability patterns across 16 categories: prompt injection, data exfiltration, privilege escalation, supply chain, excessive agency, output handling, system prompt leakage, memory poisoning, tool misuse, rogue agent, trigger abuse, dangerous code (AST), taint tracking, YARA signatures, MCP least privilege, and MCP tool poisoning Two-stage analysis : Fast static analysis + optional LLM semantic evaluation Live vulnerability lookups : SC4 queries OSV.dev for real-time CVE data with automatic offline fallback Multiple output formats : Terminal, JSON, Markdown, and SARIF reports Risk scoring : 0-100 score with severity labels and clear recommendations Quick Start Installation Create and activate a virtual environment first (all make targets assume the venv is active). Use uv or pip ; the Makefile uses uv if available, otherwise pip . # Clone the repository git clone https://github.com/NVIDIA/skillspector.git cd skillspector # Create and activate virtual environment uv venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate # or: python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate # Install for production use make install # Or install with development dependencies make install-dev Docker (no Python required) Run SkillSpector without installing Python by building it locally from the included Dockerfile . The image is based on the Docker Official Python 3.12-slim-
title_es: NVIDIA lanza SkillSpector: escáner de seguridad para agentes de IA
bajada: NVIDIA publicó SkillSpector, herramienta de seguridad para detectar vulnerabilidades en skills de agentes de IA. El 26.1% de skills contienen vulnerabilidades, lo que hace esta herramienta crítica para usuarios de agentes.
bajada_en: NVIDIA released SkillSpector, a security scanner for AI agent skills. With 26.1% of skills containing vulnerabilities, this tool is critical for agent users.

title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
summary: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.
title_es: OpenAI enfrenta investigación de fiscales generales estatales
bajada: Fiscales de varios estados estadounidenses investigan políticas de publicidad y manejo de datos de salud de OpenAI. La acción refleja escrutinio regulatorio creciente sobre prácticas de empresas de IA.
bajada_en: State attorneys general are investigating OpenAI's ad policies and health data handling practices. The action reflects growing regulatory scrutiny of AI company practices.

title: Making Claude a Chemist
title_es: Anthropic mejora Claude para tareas de química molecular
bajada: Un nuevo paper de investigación de Anthropic detalla cómo optimizaron Claude para aplicaciones en química. El trabajo demuestra capacidades especializadas de LLMs en dominios científicos específicos.
bajada_en: A new Anthropic research paper details how they optimized Claude for chemistry applications. The work demonstrates specialized LLM capabilities in specific scientific domains.

title: AI OSS tool repo goes archived over night after raising $7.3M Seed
title_es: Herramienta open-source archiva repositorio tras obtener $7.3M
bajada: TensorZero, una herramienta de código abierto, archivó su repositorio después de recaudar financiamiento de semilla. El caso plantea preguntas sobre el modelo de sostenibilidad de proyectos open-source con inversión corporativa.
bajada_en: TensorZero, an open-source tool, archived its repository after raising seed funding. The case raises questions about sustainability models for funded open-source projects.

title: Show HN: Paca – Lightweight Jira alternative for human-AI collaboration
summary: I built Paca out of pure passion—a free and lightweight Jira alternative written in Go where humans and AI agents work together as equal teammates to plan sprints and assign tasks to each other. It is fully customizable with custom views, fields, and a WASM-based plugin architecture. My team uses it daily for our own development, so it will be continuously maintained and completely free foreverComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48515385Points: 158# Comments: 56
title_es: Paca: alternativa liviana a Jira para colaboración humano-IA
bajada: Un developer lanzó Paca, herramienta open-source escrita en Go para que humanos y agentes de IA colaboren en planificación. El proyecto destaca el crecimiento de herramientas diseñadas para flujos de trabajo con agentes.
bajada_en: A developer launched Paca, an open-source tool for humans and AI agents to collaborate on planning. The project highlights growing tools designed for agent-based workflows.

title: The Verifier Tax: Horizon-Dependent Safety–Success Tradeoffs in Tool-Using LLM Agents [R]
summary: We recently presented a paper at ACM CAIS 2026 on safety evaluation for tool-using LLM agents.The core issue is that task completion alone can be misleading: an agent may complete a task while violating a safety or policy constraint. We separate outcomes intosafe success,unsafe success, andfailure, and study how verification changes this tradeoff.We evaluate this usingτ-bench / Tau-benchtool-use scenarios and propose atwo-tier verification architecture: deterministic policy/tool checks first, followed by an LLM-based verifier for more contextual safety cases.The main finding is that verification can reduce unsafe success, but it can also reduce task completion as the task horizon increases. This creates what we call theVerifier Tax: a horizon-dependent safety–success tradeoff in tool-using agents.Paper:https://dl.acm.org/doi/full/10.1145/3786335.3813160Curious how others think agent evaluations should report unsafe success. Should unsafe completion be counted as success, failure, or a separate category?submitted by/u/AccomplishedLeg1508[link][comments]
title_es: Research: tradeoffs de seguridad en agentes con herramientas
bajada: Un paper presentado en ACM CAIS 2026 analiza el dilema de seguridad-completitud en agentes LLM. El concepto del "Verifier Tax" sugiere que aumentar seguridad puede reducir rendimiento en tareas complejas.
bajada_en: A paper at ACM CAIS 2026 analyzes the safety-completeness tradeoff in LLM agents. The "Verifier Tax" concept suggests that increasing safety can reduce performance on complex tasks.

title: Meta’s chaotic AI strategy
title_es: Estrategia de IA en Meta: caos y cambios disruptivos
bajada: Un reportaje detalla desorden en la estrategia de IA de Meta, con interrupciones de Zuckerberg en reuniones de empleados. El artículo sugiere falta de claridad en la dirección de la empresa respecto a prioridades de IA.
bajada_en: A report details chaos in Meta's AI strategy, with Zuckerberg interrupting employee meetings. The article suggests lack of clarity in the company's AI direction and priorities.

title: AI coding at home without going broke
title_es: Ejecutar IA para coding en casa sin arruinarse
bajada: Un desarrollador comparte estrategias prácticas para usar herramientas de IA en programación con presupuesto limitado. La guía es útil para developers que quieren experimentar con IA sin costos prohibitivos.
bajada_en: A developer shares practical strategies for using AI coding tools on a limited budget. The guide is useful for developers wanting to experiment with AI without prohibitive costs.
